name: Discovery Call
description: Open-ended exploration of prospect needs, goals, and current situation

phases.name: Current State
phases.guidance: Understand their current situation. Ask: How are you handling this today?

phases.name: Goals
phases.guidance: Uncover desired outcomes. Ask: What does success look like for you?

phases.name: Challenges
phases.guidance: Surface blockers. Ask: What's preventing you from achieving that today?

phases.name: Impact
phases.guidance: Quantify the impact. Ask: How does this affect your team/revenue/timeline?

phases.name: Next Steps
phases.guidance: Establish momentum. Ask: What would a good next step look like?
